name: pepper
description: Runtime control for iOS simulator apps. Dylib injected at launch — no source modifications needed. 31 MCP tools organized by prefix for navigation, debugging, state inspection, and automation.

tools.name: app_look
tools.description: Primary observation tool — returns full UI hierarchy map

tools.name: app_build
tools.description: Build, install, and launch the app with Pepper injected

tools.name: app_build_hw
tools.description: Build the app for a physical device (USB/WiFi)

tools.name: app_status
tools.description: Check Pepper connection health and app info

tools.name: app_record
tools.description: Record simulator screen as mp4 or GIF

tools.name: app_snapshot
tools.description: Save/compare named baselines of screen state

tools.name: app_console
tools.description: Capture and read app console output (print/os_log)

tools.name: app_network
tools.description: Monitor HTTP traffic — start, stop, log, filter

tools.name: app_debug
tools.description: Deep debugging: layers, crash_log, constraints, responder_chain, target_actions, highlight, lifecycle, notifications, webview

tools.name: app_perf
tools.description: Performance: perf, animations, heap, hangs, renders, timers

tools.name: app_swiftui
tools.description: SwiftUI debugging: renders tracking, body inspection

tools.name: app_automation
tools.description: Automation: script, wait_for, wait_idle, concurrency

tools.name: app_eval
tools.description: Compile and execute arbitrary Swift inside the running app. Full access to UIKit, SwiftUI, Foundation, and the app's own types. Use for runtime introspection, state mutation, or anything the existing tools can't do.

tools.name: ui_tap
tools.description: Tap an element by label, icon, heuristic, or coordinates

tools.name: ui_scroll
tools.description: Scroll by direction or scroll until target text is visible

tools.name: ui_swipe
tools.description: Quick flick gestures between pages or dismiss

tools.name: ui_input
tools.description: Enter or replace text in a field

tools.name: ui_toggle
tools.description: Flip a switch or change segmented control

tools.name: ui_gesture
tools.description: Multi-touch gestures (pinch-to-zoom, rotation)

tools.name: ui_query
tools.description: Query elements: find, tree, verify, read, assert

tools.name: ui_accessibility
tools.description: Accessibility: audit, action, events

tools.name: nav_go
tools.description: Navigate to a screen via deeplink or tab switch

tools.name: nav_back
tools.description: Go back one screen in navigation stack

tools.name: nav_dismiss
tools.description: Close modal, sheet, popover, or overlay

tools.name: nav_keyboard
tools.description: Dismiss the on-screen keyboard

tools.name: nav_dialog
tools.description: Interact with dialogs and dismiss system prompts

tools.name: nav_screen
tools.description: Identify which screen is currently displayed

tools.name: state_vars
tools.description: Inspect/mutate ViewModel @Published properties at runtime

tools.name: state_tools
tools.description: State: defaults, keychain, clipboard, cookies, sandbox, coredata, undo_manager, flags

tools.name: net_tools
tools.description: Network: mock, simulate, http_call, timeline

tools.name: sys_tools
tools.description: System: push, orientation, locale, appearance, dynamic_type, hook, frameworks, usage

tools.name: sim_control
tools.description: Control simulator: permissions, GPS, biometrics, install, boot/shutdown

tools.name: sim_raw
tools.description: Send a registered dylib command. NOT a code evaluator.
